calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-16-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Ericka Larnauti, CSR: Carl Sauceda.
Ben Lunine, Esq., for Petitioner: Deena Michele Hill, aka Deena Michel Hill, present, sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Leo Deena Michel Hill.
The Court further orders the gender of Leo Deena Michel Hill is changed from Female to Male.
Decree signed in open court.
